serviceDescription: A map service on the www depicting areas defined by the Public Lands Survey System Grid. Normally, 36 sections make up a township. Sections cover US Forest Service Unit Boundaries. The map service uses a File Geodatabase data source with Web Mercator projection. Sections Metadata
